name: @enclawed/mcp-imap-smtp
description: Bundled bridge: protocol-level IMAP + SMTP MCP server. Translates the MCP tools/call envelope into IMAP IDLE/SEARCH/FETCH/APPEND/STORE and SMTP message-send, authenticated by a single app-specific password. Works against Gmail, Fastmail, iCloud, Proton (via Bridge), or any IETF-compliant IMAP/SMTP host.
